title: Extract payment_action_overlay_text helper
description:
Lines 626-668 in decrypt_and_display contain a nested match over PaymentAction variants, each generating an overlay notification string. This 42-line pattern:
- Mixes message formatting with state updates
- Makes it hard to test message text independently
- Complicates i18n or localization changes

Extract: fn payment_action_overlay_text(action: &PaymentAction, from_name: &str) -> String

This will:
- Separate formatting from side effects
- Allow testing message text without full event handler
- Make it easier to add i18n later
- Keep decrypt_and_display focused on MLS/JSON handling
close_reason: deferred to backlog; P3/P4 style issues, not blocking epic completion
